steps.t: You should ask the Avorrim around Edhellond what kind of flowers to put in the now-empty vase.
You have been advised to talk to an Elf named Calendorion. You can find him at one of the piers in Edhellond, facing the Bay of Belfalas.
Calendorion has asked you to pick a certain type of flower to put in the vase. You can find these beautiful flowers near the piers in Edhellond.
You have picked enough flowers to fill the vase. You should return to the tower in Edhellond to place them into the vase.
You should tell Calendorion that he need not worry about the vase's flowers for now. He can be found at one of the piers in Edhellond, facing the Bay …
